title: BarCraft Cocktail Jigger Dual Spirit Measure Cup, Stainless Steel, 25ml/50ml
features: What You'll Get - A glistening stainless steel dual measure spirit jigger, for single (25ml) and double (50ml) shot measures
Measure Like a Pro - This dual jigger is ideal for precision cocktail making, completing cocktail set or for treating yourself to a shot of delicious whisky
Designed for Spirits - Use this double ended jigger to measure gin, vodka and rum for cocktails, or simply to enjoy a drop of whiskey on a night in
Durable Materials - Made from strong, rust-resistant stainless steel
Guaranteed Quality - The cocktail jigger measures 4.5 x 4.5 x 8.5 cm (1.5 Inch x 1.5 Inch x 3.5 Inch) and comes with a 12 month guarantee
description: From the manufacturer BarCraft Double Cocktail Measure / Spirit Jigger (25 ml / 50 ml) Your homemade cocktails will measure up well with this handsome cocktail jigger! A cocktail jigger is an essential tool that no home bar should be without. With its clever double-ended design, this stylish stainless steel jigger helps you to pour single and double measures like a pro – quickly and accurately. Simply pour your spirit into the smaller side for a single, or flip it round and use the larger size for a double. Easy! So whether you’re pouring out spirits to add to cocktails and mixers or simply sizing up a glass of whiskey ready for a quiet evening in, you’ll be able to create delicious mixtures and keep tabs on how much you’ve used. Useful information Measures single (25 ml / 1 fl oz) and double (50 ml / 1¾ fl oz) measures Width: 4.5 cm (1½ inches) Height: 8.5 cm (3½ inches) Certified food safe Hand-wash only Discover the BarCraft range BarCraft is KitchenCraft's barware brand. This stylish, innovative collection is made up of dozens of tools and accessories - enough to satisfy all drinking preferences and occasions. With everything from shakers to strainers, muddlers to jiggers, it's easy to craft the perfect concoction for a glamorous cocktail evening. Or why not savour the sophisticated notes of a vintage wine with BarCraft's aerators, filters and chillers? Whatever your tipple of choice, BarCraft helps you enjoy every moment. Mix Things Up a Bit Luxurious look Whether you’re barbecuing outside or holding a cocktail party inside, the shimmer of this jigger really stands out. Why not match it up with Bar Craft’s cocktail shaker (KCBCSHAK5) or cocktail muddler (KCBCMUDD) to start your own bartending set? Stainless steel Once you get started with your spirit measure, you’re sure to want to use it all the time, so you’ll be happy to know that, as it’s made of stainless steel, it resists rust and is resistant to flavours and odours. What other excuse do you need to keep making cocktails? Double ended design There’s a good reason that the design of this jigger is so popular: you get two measures in one tool. Just flip the jigger to the end that you need and get pouring!
